labels.value: Are you sure you want to send notification for invalid documents? If YES, please click the button Next If NO, please click the button X

labels.shortDescription: Subject del task para sección informacion ajustes - Estudio de conexión
labels.value: Entrega al OR del estudios - diagrama unifilar - esquema protecciones - equipos que limiten energia

labels.shortDescription: Subject del task para sección informacion ajustes - Documental
labels.value: Tiempo de subsanacion del solicitante - Documental

labels.shortDescription: Subject del task para sección informacion ajustes - Técnica
labels.value: Tiempo de subsanacion del solicitante - Tecnica

labels.shortDescription: Subject del task para sección informacion ajustes - Técnica tipo C
Recordatorio de limpiar campos antes de iniciar nueva reivisón

labels.value: Deben haber visitas finalizadas para poder generar la carta de respuesta

labels.shortDescription: Email para enviar correos de Revision tecnica
Mensaje precargado observaciones cliente - Tab revision tecnica
labels.value: De acuerdo con la revisión efectudada a sus proyecto ****, su diseño esta en un estado pre aprobado, en espera de los documentos C y F, de acuerdo con lo indicado en el Anexo 5 literal VII numeral 7 de la resolución CREG 174
There was an error saving the record.
ATTENTION: There is already an active Virtual Visit for the entered request Id!
Inviata Email di riepilogo del Rapporto sulla Virtual Visit!
ATTENTION: The phone number must contain numbers only!
You have to choose an Assistant
Vsita criada/agendada, para direcioná-la ao Synergia, seguir à Ordens de Trabalho relacionadas
La cola seleccionada no contiene operadores activos, para continuar seleccione una cola diferente.
The Interlocutor and the Requestor are the same person
Vuoi valutare la visita virtuale come non efficace?
Vuoi valutare la visita virtuale come 'Incongruenza della posizione causa cliente' ?
Vuoi valutare la visita virtuale come 'Incongruenza della richiesta causa cliente' ?
ATTENTION: Booked Start Date cannot be less than the current date time!
Are you sure you want to delete the virtual visit draft?
Sei sicuro di voler registrare il tentativo di chiamata cliente?
At least one tag must be selected
Acrylic or glass protection is missing on the visor of the measuring box
Box(es) from manufacturer not approved by the distributor, or non-standard
Missing insulator and/or bracket with two or more insulators
Insulator on the side of the column
Measuring box in poor condition (rusted, peeling paint, warped, thin plate, cracked, others)
Services partially performed, without inspection conditions
Post/column indented or in disagreement with the approved project
Post or column with exposed hardware, cracked or broken without bonding conditions
Private post not approved (see distributor's website)
Use rigid conduit for the grounding conductor
ART (technical responsibility note) regarding the electromechanical EXECUTION of the measurement center
Adapt protection device according to the approved project
Adjust reconnection time after utility grid failure to 180 seconds
Box(es) from manufacturer not approved by Enel SP, or non-standard
Customer did not allow the inspection to be carried out
Electrician required on site to monitor inspection
Indentificar as unidades consumidoras com placas, na porta externa, ao lado da medição e ao lado da proteção individual
Incompatible circuit breaker with input extension
Install a warning plate on the measurement box cover, according to the model available in NT-6.012 from Enel Distribuição SP
Install AC Stringbox with the inverter according to the previously approved project
Install DPS (Surge Protection Device) as per the project.
Install DPS Class 1 in the Consumer Input protection compartment and DPS Class 2 in the QDCA (Inverter more than 10 meters from the consumer input)
Install DPS Class 2 in the Consumer Input protection compartment (Inverter up to 10 meters from the consumer input)
Install Stringbox CC according to previously approved project
Inverter installed in a place with a ceiling height less than 2.0 meters

Inverter was not installed in an appropriate, easily accessible location (ceilings, mezzanines, slabs or any other part of the building with difficult access, without a fixed interconnection structure)
Measurement Center was not executed in accordance with the approved project
Parameterize the inverter according to the Delta system with Neutral (Minimum 192V / Maximum 164V)
Parametrizar or inversor compliant with Estrela system com Neutro (Minima 176V / Máxima 242V)
The power factor must be adjusted, admitting a variation between 0.90 Inductive to 0.90 Capacitive (Inverter P > 6kW)
The power factor must be adjusted admitting variation between 0.95 Inductive to 0.95 Capacitive (3kW Inverter < P ≤ 6kW)
The power factor must be equal to 1, admitting variation between 0.98 Inductive to 0.98 Capacitive (Inverter ≤ 3kW)
Power input in poor condition, adjust according to standard
Remove excess circuit breakers from the consumer input protection compartment (Only General, BI and other protection circuit breakers allowed for the DG power supply circuit, if any)
Replace the single-pole circuit breaker with a bipolar circuit breaker (Consumer Input)
The SPD`s must be connected after the consumer input general circuit breaker (Client side)
There is no feeder branch from the consumer unit (pigtail), with a section provided for in the project
Use eyelet-type terminals (Tubular Pin) at the ends of flexible cables
Non è possibile scegliere questa causale, perchè la email è stata confermata
Masonry compartment construction for the centralized meter/panel housing,as indicated in attachment A
Meter housing artifact construction, as indicated in attachment A
Container for 2 Single / Three-phase GdMs up to 15kW (A = 40, B = 42, C = 22)
Container for Single / Three-phase GdM up to 15kW (A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
Container for Three-phase GdM between 15kW and 30kW (A = 72, B = 66, C = 27)
Do you want to assign yourself the virtual visit?

labels.shortDescription: E' già stata inviata una notifica
labels.value: E' già stata inviata una notifica al cliente. Riprovare tra qualche minuto.

labels.shortDescription: Inserire Cod Rintracciabilità per verifica se appuntamento è elegibile
labels.value: Inserisci il codice di rintracciabilità ﻿e verifica se puoi prendere un appuntamento virtuale!

labels.shortDescription: Pagina per appuntamento non eseguibile con Virtual Visit
labels.value: Siamo spiacenti, il tuo appuntamento non può essere stabilito con visita virtuale.

labels.shortDescription: Dopo aver inserito il codice di rintyracciabilità e la VV è elegibile
labels.value: Il tuo appuntamento può essere stabilito con visita virtuale. Se vuoi prenotare una visita virtuale, procedi per verificare la disponibilità.

labels.shortDescription: End of the last flow guide
labels.value: End of the last flow guide
La Virtual Visit è già Iniziata.
Did you briefly explain how the execution of the virtual visit works?
You need to flag the checkbox to continue
GdM for electric car charging station > 30kW (A = 75, B = 175, C = 42)
GdM for electric cars charging station up to 30kW (A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
GdM for Optic Fiber cabinet authorized by agreement
GdM for supply > 30kW (minimum A = 75, B = 175, C = 42)
GdM per cabinet up to 30kW (A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
Sorry, it seems you are not allowed to create Virtual Visit
Counter housing container Implementation, as indicated in attachment A
Virtual visit concluded: incompatibility with the interlocutor's position is found
Virtual visit completed: incompatibility with the request address is found
Virtual visit completed: incompatibility with the request data and request address is found
Virtual visit completed: incompatibility with the request data is found
Kind of box to be installed
Live-video viewing with the partner started
Masonry compartment (minimum values ​​A, B, C, Ø to be entered manually)
The note is too long. Maximum limit of 255 characters.
Maximum limit of selections per the tag
ATTENTION: it is possible to archive up to a maximum of 3 Attachments per section! N.B. In the case of Schematic for concealed and underground layout the number of attachments is cumulative
You still need to upload an image for these mandatory tags
n.2 Single / Three-phase GdM up to 30kW (A = 40, B = 42, C = 22)
Authorization and / or permissions from the Distributor

The flow guide cannot be terminated because no live-video has been performed. Make sure you have completed the VRA. If necessary start a new live-video: reset the session by clicking the "Reset Session" button and send a new invitation by clicking the "Send Invitation" button
The flow guide cannot be terminated because no VRA has been started. Start the VRA by clicking on the "Send Invite" button

No data was changed!
If you don't want to edit data click the "X" button on the top-right of the page
Non puoi eseguire questa operazione perché la Virtual Visit è iniziata/conclusa.
Note about the need of Authorization or Permission From Distributor to Send to Customer
Notes about internal dimensions of the wells
Dear user, in case of non-correspondence, notes must be entered
Notes for relevant observations on the images / data acquired
These notes will be inserted in the form that we will send to the customer
These notes will be in the VV technical report and will be used for following interventions / works
Obtaining permits on private condominium property
Permits on private condominium property notes
Other compositions (values ​​A, B, C, Ø to be entered manually)
Other dimension to be entered manually
Otherwise click on the Finish button
COMPLETA - NO CUMPLE (SE REQUIERE CORRECCIÓN POR CLIENTE)
Phone field can only contain numbers and a maximum of 13 digits
L'Sms di riconoscimento è già stato inviato.
Non è possibile inviare l'sms di riconoscimento. Riprovare tra qualche minuto.
Notes about the schematic representation of the layout
UnderGround Schematic representation of the layout in private or condominium property
Schematic representation of the works to be carried out by the Distributor on the applicant's property
Sei sicuro di voler registrare che la Virtual Visit si è conclusa con insuccesso?

labels.shortDescription: Asks the user if he wants to send a verification email
labels.value: Do you want to send the customer a confirmation email?

labels.shortDescription: Message to show in the page when the mail has not been confirmed
labels.value: The customer must confirm the email in order to start the virtual visit. You can use the appropriate button to send the confirmation email.

It seems that the customer has not consented to the Service terms. Send the SMS again to the customer reminding him to click on the link and then accept the service terms clicking on the appropriate "Agree" button.

It seems that the Session has been ended. If you want try again Send the SMS to the customer once again, reminding him to click on the link and then accept the service terms clicking on the appropriate "Agree" button.
The Image size is too large
Single-phase up to 10 kW (to be filled in)
Single / Three-phase GdM up to 15kW (A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
Single / Three-phase GdM up to 15kW (minimum measurements A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
Single / Three-phase GdM up to 30kW (A = 23, B = 42, C = 22)
Booked Start Date cannot be less than the current date time!

labels.shortDescription: Start of the first flow guide
labels.value: Start of the first flow guide
To upload a new Image: 1. Select one or more Information image related 2. Write a description about the image 3. Select and Upload the Image 4. Click on Archive
Los datos de la visita virtual cambiaron correctamente!
Technical specification attachments for excavation and pipe laying
Technical specification attachments for meter housing
Three-phase GdM between 15kW and 30kW (A = 71.4, B = 66, C = 27.1)
Three-phase GdM between 15kW and 30kW (minimum measurements A = 72, B = 66, C = 27)

Three-phase over 30 kW (to be filled in)
Three-phase up to 30 kW (to be filled in)
Editar datos de la Visita Virtual
You have exceeded the maximum amount of allowed image size sum
Underground or concealed piping laying, as indicated in Annex B
Useful notes for the back office
Useful notes for the next works
The virtual visit is not assigned to a single user but to a group, therefore the data of the virtual assistant who is running the flow will be automatically entered
The flow guide cannot be terminated because the VRA session is still in progress. Conclude the current VRA
You need to select a valid value to continue
Virtual Inspection Session is definetely finished
As you requested, the Virtual Visit has been assigned to the queue
Virtual Visit has been successfully Assigned
Virtual Visit Aggiornata con la motivazione di insuccesso fornita
You can select only one option
You need to insert a valid value
Email non confermata da parte del cliente
Il cliente vuole annullare la visita virtuale
n.2 Single / Three-phase GdM up to 15kW (A = 40, B = 42, C = 22)
N.2 Single / Three-phase GdM up to 15kW (minimum measurements A = 40, B = 42, C = 22)
